Global (All).title: Global COVID-19 Mortality Rate
Global (All).summary: The global COVID-19 mortality rate has increased in the past 7 days, indicating a potential risk to public health.

Global (All).title: Climate Protests Intensify Globally
Global (All).summary: Climate change protests have intensified worldwide over the past 7 days, posing a risk to global stability and economic security.

Global (All).title: Escalating Global Tensions Between Major Powers
Global (All).summary: Escalating tensions between major global powers have increased the risk of conflict and destabilization in the past 7 days.

United States.title: Biden signs Executive Order on Artificial Intelligence
United States.summary: President Biden has signed an Executive Order on artificial intelligence, aiming to promote the development and safe use of AI technologies.

United States.title: House Republicans Move to Remove Rep. Ilhan Omar from Committee Seats
United States.summary: The move, which is part of efforts to remove Rep. Omar from her committee seats, has sparked controversy and raised concerns about democracy.

United States.title: US Justice Dept. charges 5 Chinese nationals with operating massive hacking group
United States.summary: The DoJ announced that five Chinese nationals were charged with operating a hacking group, emphasizing concerns about cybersecurity and state-sponsored hacking.

South Korea.title: North Korea's Kim calls for 'maximum strength' against US
South Korea.summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un called for the country to make the economy self-sufficient and bolster its military, amid a standoff with the US over its nuclear programme.

South Korea.title: S. Korea to tighten visa requirements for Russians amid Ukraine war
South Korea.summary: South Korea will tighten its visa requirements for Russian citizens and impose penalties on Russian firms over their business practices amid Moscow's invasion of Ukraine.

South Korea.title: S. Korea's new COVID-19 cases surpass 100,000
South Korea.summary: South Korea on Thursday reported over 100,000 new COVID-19 cases as the country continued to see a surge in infections, with hospitals struggling to cope with the influx of patients.

Japan.title: Japan's PM Fumio Kishida to Visit China Amid Tensions Over Taiwan
Japan.summary: Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida will visit China on July 19 for a meeting with Xi Jinping, amid growing tensions between the two nations over Taiwan. The visit is expected to focus on economic ties, but the presence of Chinese military activities in the South China Sea has raised concerns about regional security.

Japan.title: Earthquake in East Japan: Magnitude 5.8 Quake Hits Ibaraki Prefecture
Japan.summary: A magnitude 5.8 earthquake struck Ibaraki Prefecture in eastern Japan on July 15, causing no reported damage or injuries. The quake was detected at 11:35 PM local time and was centered approximately 40 kilometers east-southeast of the city of Mito.

Japan.title: Typhoon in Japan: Landfall Expected on July 17
Japan.summary: A powerful typhoon is expected to make landfall on Japan's southern island of Kyushu on July 17, with strong winds and heavy rainfall forecasted to hit the region. The Japan Meteorological Agency has warned of possible power outages, property damage, and disruptions to transportation services.
